summary: WeatherAPI REST service for real-time weather, multi-day forecasts, historical lookups, alerts, astronomy, and location autocomplete using API-key authenticated HTTP requests.

auth.instructions: Create an account at WeatherAPI.com to obtain an API key, then pass it as the required `key` query parameter on every request (for example: `?key=<YOUR_API_KEY>&q=London`). The docs state requests can be sent over HTTP or HTTPS.

endpoints.name: get-current-weather
endpoints.description: Returns current weather data for a location query.

endpoints.name: get-forecast
endpoints.description: Returns forecast weather; supports day count and optional alerts/air-quality data.

endpoints.name: get-history
endpoints.description: Returns historical weather for a location and date.

endpoints.name: get-alerts
endpoints.description: Returns active weather alerts/warnings for supported regions and the requested location.

endpoints.name: search-locations
endpoints.description: Autocomplete/search endpoint for matching city, postal code, or other supported location queries.

endpoints.name: get-astronomy
endpoints.description: Returns astronomy data (e.g., sunrise/sunset and moon phase) for a location and date.
